scripts.mcp:serve: AGENT_SKILL_EVALS_EXAMPLES_DIR=$PWD uv run --project mcp fastmcp run mcp/skill_server.py --transport streamable-http --host ${AGENT_SKILL_EVALS_MCP_HOST:-127.0.0.1} --port ${AGENT_SKILL_EVALS_MCP_PORT:-8765} --path /mcp/
scripts.eval:mcp: pnpm run eval:mcp:claude && pnpm run eval:mcp:codex
scripts.eval:mcp:claude: PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH PROMPTFOO_DISABLE_TELEMETRY=1 node scripts/with-http-mcp.mjs promptfoo eval -c promptfoo.mcp.yaml --no-cache --no-write
scripts.eval:mcp:codex: PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH PROMPTFOO_DISABLE_TELEMETRY=1 node scripts/with-http-mcp.mjs promptfoo eval -c promptfoo.mcp.codex.yaml --no-cache --no-write
scripts.eval:routing: pnpm run eval:mcp && pnpm run eval:native:pi
scripts.eval:real: export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH; if command -v codex >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm run eval:codex; else echo 'Skipping eval:codex: codex CLI not found'; fi && if command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm run eval:claude; else echo 'Skipping eval:claude: claude CLI not found'; fi && if command -v pi >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm run eval:pi; else echo 'Skipping eval:pi: pi CLI not found'; fi
